goal: Generate concise lower-third and source-strip text variants that can populate recurring documentary identifiers without breaking the series tone.

visual_requirements.color_notes: designed for dark parchment beds and aged gold/red accent systems
visual_requirements.composition_notes: short primary line, optional secondary descriptor, fast readability, clear emphasis
must_include: one slightly more dramatic but still credible option

text_inputs.primary_text: Replace with subject or speaker name.
text_inputs.secondary_text: Replace with role, institution, location, or short descriptor.

review_checks: Avoids clickbait or modern copy tone
destination_after_approval: Use approved text in episode-specific script or graphics notes, or populate reusable citation-strip comps under visual-library/02-series-kits/episode-neutral/.
run_notes: Best paired with text-population-template.md. Keep variants short and screen-ready.
